name: Amazing Mexican Quinoa Salad
instructions:
Prepare the quinoa and brown rice ahead of time: Cook the quinoa and brown rice according to package directions, then spread them out on a baking sheet or large plate to cool completely to room temperature. This is important because warm grains will wilt the vegetables and make the salad soggy.

1. In a large glass or plastic container with a tight-fitting lid, combine the cooled cooked quinoa, pinto beans (drained and rinsed if using canned), kidney beans (drained and rinsed if using canned), corn kernels (fresh, frozen and thawed, or canned and drained), finely diced red onion, cooled cooked brown rice, diced bell pepper, and roughly chopped fresh cilantro. Toss everything together gently to distribute all the ingredients evenly throughout the salad.

2. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, chili powder, minced or pressed garlic, salt, freshly ground black pepper, and cayenne pepper until the dressing is well combined and the spices are evenly distributed. Taste the dressing and adjust the seasoning if needed. Add more cayenne for extra heat or more vinegar for tanginess. Pour the dressing over the quinoa mixture and toss thoroughly to coat every ingredient, making sure the flavors penetrate throughout the salad.

3. Cover the container tightly with the lid and place it in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to blend and develop. The beans and grains will absorb the dressing and become more flavorful with time. The salad can be made up to 2 days ahead and stored in the refrigerator.

4. Before serving, remove the salad from the refrigerator and give it a good stir to redistribute the dressing and any ingredients that may have settled to the bottom. Taste one more time and adjust the seasoning if needed. Serve the salad chilled or at room temperature as a refreshing side dish or light main course.
simpleInstructions:
Prepare ahead: Cook and cool quinoa and rice completely.

1. Combine cooled quinoa, both beans, corn, onion, rice, bell pepper, and cilantro in a container.

2. Whisk together oil, vinegar, chili powder, garlic, salt, and peppers, then pour over salad and toss.

3. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours for flavors to blend.

4. Stir well before serving chilled or at room temperature.
